Comprehensive Index of Major and Minor Hellenic & Eurasian Traditions: Canons, Epics, Hymns, Fragments

This index covers the major and minor religious, poetic, and philosophical traditions of the Hellenic world and broader Eurasia, focusing on extant corpora, canonical texts, epics, hymns, liturgies, and fragments. Where possible, numeric dates, major works, and digital resources are included.

Major Canons/Collections: Oral/liturgical tradition, Homeric Hymns, Orphic Hymns
Key Texts (Major & Minor): Homeric Hymns, Orphic Hymns, local liturgies, temple inscriptions
Divisions/Notes: Rituals, hymns to Olympian gods, hero cults, local festivals

Key Texts (Major & Minor): Iliad (Homer), Odyssey (Homer), Theogony (Hesiod), Works and Days (Hesiod), fragments of lost epics
Divisions/Notes: Foundation of Greek myth, theology, hero cult

Key Texts (Major & Minor): Sappho, Alcaeus, Pindar, Bacchylides, Simonides, Anacreon
Divisions/Notes: Choral odes, victory hymns, personal poetry

Key Texts (Major & Minor): Orphic Hymns, Orphic Gold Tablets, Homeric Hymn to Demeter
Plato (Dialogues), Aristotle (Corpus), Epicurus (Letters, Principal Doctrines), Zeno (Stoic fragments), Pyrrho (Skeptic fragments)
Hymns to Isis, Hymns to Serapis, Cybele liturgies, Atargatis hymns, ruler cult inscriptions
Divisions/Notes: Egyptian, Anatolian, Syrian cults, ruler worship, astrology, magic

Key Texts (Major & Minor): Greek Magical Papyri, curse tablets (defixiones), Delphic oracle responses
